message:
Add scanner FormatImpactReport + bv compact triage branch tests

scanner/analysis: FormatImpactReport 81.8% → 97.0% (blocks, centrality,
  truncation, empty, graph-available branches). Overall 64.5% → 65.1%

bv/markdown: renderCompactTriage 80.8% → improved (TopPicks with/without
  reasons, QuickWins, Commands, truncation). Overall 43.9% → 44.6%
